summary: Comprehensive testing of Devil features, God sacked status, and Dashboard trade tally. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend components verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: GET /api/god/notices returns list of fleet notices
GET /api/god/notices includes GOD_SACKED, DECREE, TRIAL_PERIOD notice types
GET /api/god/notices has proper structure (ts, type, from, to, message, severity)
GET /api/devil/status has prompt_cards list (20 pending cards)
GET /api/global returns expected structure with kitty

header_trade_tally.description: TRADES (4,556), WINS (3,845), LOSSES (711) displayed between Real Kitty and Fleet WR sections

god_sacked_banner.description: Command Center shows 'God (Sacked — Scribe Promoted)' header with red banner

devil_panel.description: The Devil section shows TRIAL PERIOD — GRACE, 20 prompt cards with SET buttons

devil_prompt_cards.description: Prompt cards are interactive - user can enter value and click SET to set requirement

fleet_notices.description: Fleet Notices show GOD_SACKED, DECREE, TRIAL_PERIOD notice types with proper color styling

command_center_link.description: Command Center link in header navigates to /command page

seed_data_creation: None - system uses live WebSocket data from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Devil features complete and working. Key features: (1) Dashboard header shows TRADES/WINS/LOSSES tally between Real Kitty and Fleet WR, (2) God has been sacked on initialization - Scribe promoted to God (this is by design), (3) The Devil is a NEW entity that enforces requirements - checks audits are done, communicates daily requirements, (4) Trial period mode with grace until live, (5) 20 prompt cards for setting requirements (8 supervisors x 2 metrics + 2 god metrics + 2 scribe metrics), (6) Fleet notices include GOD_SACKED, DECREE, TRIAL_PERIOD, PROMOTION types. Note: cTrader execution is MOCKED (pending Spotware approval).

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/god/notices: Returns fleet notices with GOD_SACKED, DECREE, TRIAL_PERIOD, PROMOTION types
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/devil/set-requirement: Sets a requirement value for a role/metric
